title: Stride Asset Store - Manifest
description: Describes an asset published to the store. Lives at <repo>/AssetData/manifest.json.

url.description: The author's profile or website (e.g. their GitHub profile or homepage) — NOT the asset repository.

description.description: Short summary. The long description goes in AssetData/README.md.

license.description: SPDX identifier; must be one of catalog/licenses.json.

strideVersion.description: OPTIONAL override. By default the Stride version is read from the .csproj (Stride.* PackageReference). Only set this if detection fails.

thumbnail.description: Path relative to the REPOSITORY ROOT, e.g. thumbnail.png. Display-only (kept at the root so it is not cloned into projects). ~512x512 recommended.

media.description: Paths (relative to the REPOSITORY ROOT) to images OR short videos (e.g. .png, .jpg, .mp4, .webm), shown in a gallery on the asset page. Keep display-only media at the root; for packs whose media is the content itself (e.g. textures) point at AssetData/...

dependencies.description: Other store assets required, by id only (no version constraint). May be auto-filled from the .csproj <ProjectReference> entries by the publishing tool.

defaultImport.description: Suggested import mode. 'local' clones source (compile/modify locally) via a ProjectReference; 'nuget' adds a PackageReference. Defaults to 'local'. 'nuget' requires the nuget field.

nuget.description: Optional. Present when the asset is also published on NuGet, enabling nugetImport.

packageVersion.description: Optional pinned/suggested package version. If omitted, the app may resolve the latest compatible version.
